title: oenothera berlandieri
intro: Oenothera berlandieri, also known as the Hill Country evening primrose, is a perennial flowering plant native to the south-central United States. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oenothera berlandieri include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting skin health, with its extracts being used to treat conditions such as eczema and acne. Oenothera berlandieri is often used in herbal preparations, including tinctures, teas, and salves, which can be applied topically or taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
